description_long: This is a sleek, modern coupe car finished in a vibrant red color, featuring a streamlined fastback roofline and aggressive, sporty styling. The front end displays a wide, blacked-out grille with the Audi logo, flanked by sharp, angular headlights. The side profile reveals large, multi-spoke alloy wheels, flush door handles, and subtle sculpting along the doors and fenders. The rear is characterized by a wide stance, integrated taillights, dual exhaust outlets, and a subtle lip spoiler. The windows are tinted and seamlessly integrated into the body, with a continuous glasshouse effect. The overall design emphasizes performance and luxury, typical of high-end European coupes.
description: A red, sporty Audi coupe with a fastback roofline, large alloy wheels, and aggressive front and rear styling. The car features sleek, tinted windows and a luxurious, aerodynamic design.
description_view_0: Rear view showing wide taillights, dual exhausts, and a subtle rear spoiler.
description_view_1: Left side profile highlighting the fastback roofline, large wheels, and flush door handles.
description_view_2: Front view with a prominent Audi grille, sharp headlights, and sculpted hood.
description_view_3: Right side profile similar to the left, emphasizing the coupe's aerodynamic silhouette and wheel design.
attribute_window_configuration: four-door coupe with three side windows per side
